code:
import io
import string
import list

fn parse_tokens(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = 0
  mut tok = ""
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
      if not string.is_empty(tok)
        match string.parse_int(tok)
        when Some(v)
          result = list.push(result, v)
        when None
          ()
        end
        tok = ""
      end
    else
      tok = "#{tok}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not string.is_empty(tok)
    match string.parse_int(tok)
    when Some(v)
      result = list.push(result, v)
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  result
end

fn dedupe(_ xs: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  let n = list.len(xs)
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    match list.get(xs, i)
    when Some(v)
      if not list.contains(result, v)
        result = list.push(result, v)
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn sort_unique(_ xs: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  let n = list.len(xs)
  mut taken = 0
  mut have_last = false
  mut last = 0
  mut keep_going = true
  while keep_going
    if taken >= n
      keep_going = false
    else
      mut found = false
      mut cur = 0
      mut i = 0
      while i < n
        match list.get(xs, i)
        when Some(v)
          let eligible = (not have_last) or v > last
          if eligible
            if not found
              cur = v
              found = true
            else if v < cur
              cur = v
            end
          end
        when None
          ()
        end
        i = i + 1
      end
      if found
        result = list.push(result, cur)
        last = cur
        have_last = true
        taken = taken + 1
      else
        keep_going = false
      end
    end
  end
  result
end

let input = io.read_to_end()
let tokens = parse_tokens(input)
let unique = dedupe(tokens)
let sorted = sort_unique(unique)
let n = list.len(sorted)
mut out = ""
mut i = 0
while i < n
  match list.get(sorted, i)
  when Some(v)
    if i == 0
      out = "#{v}"
    else
      out = "#{out} #{v}"
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end
println(out)
